'''Tempest Scout 4''' was an [[All Terrain Scout Transport/Legends|All Terrain Scout Transport]] in [[Tempest Force/Legends|Tempest Force]]. It was equipped with a prototype targeting computer, and it maintained accuracy even in dense foliage. In addition, energy could be diverted from propulsion to weapons systems. It participated in the [[Battle of Endor/Legends|Battle of Endor]], and was destroyed in the battle.
